name: Carrot Leek Bisque
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a large pot.
2. Add carrot slices, garlic, onion, celery, leeks, dried basil, sage, thyme, and miso in the order listed.
3. Return to boiling, then reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes or until vegetables are soft.
4. Using a slotted spoon, remove half of the carrots and set aside.
5. Puree the remaining ingredients in a blender until smooth.
6. Return the purée to the heat, add the reserved carrots and butter.
7. Reheat gently and serve hot.
8. Garnish with 3 tablespoons sour cream and 1 tablespoon chopped chives, if desired.
